airis-mcp-gateway.note: Dynamic MCP: 60+ tools via 3 meta-tools (airis-find, airis-schema, airis-exec). All catalog servers auto-enable on first use.

context7.note: Up-to-date library documentation. Use resolve-library-id then query-docs.

playwright.note: Browser testing for frontend implementations. Navigate, snapshot, click, fill forms.

magic.note: AI-powered UI component generation. Respects project code style.

morphllm.note: FastApply (10x edit speed) + WarpGrep (context-clean code search).
